title: Lamottea pectinata
taxonomy: Lamottea pectinata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Madagascar, a country located off the coast of East Africa. The classification of Lamottea pectinata includes its genus, Lamottea, and family, Rubiaceae, which are both part of the larger kingdom, Plantae. Further classification includes the division, Magnoliophyta, and phylum, Magnoliophyta, as well as the class, Magnoliopsida. Its classification is a way of organizing and categorizing the plant's characteristics and relationships to other organisms.
